chain.thought: Explanation: In 2008, her throws were 71.00 m and 71.40 m. In 2009, her throws were 72.85 m, 74.79 m, and 70.45 m. Her best in 2009 (74.79 m) is greater than her best in 2008 (71.40 m), so she threw more meters in 2009.
